metadata.title: Advanced Canvas
metadata.description: Supercharge your canvas experience! Create presentations, flowcharts and more!

regex.source: .setName("Align node, created by double click, to grid")
regex.target: .setName("将双击创建的节点对齐到网格")
.setName('如果寻路方法为“直接”，则旋转箭头')
.setName('在节点弹出菜单中显示“设置起始节点”')
.setName("使用 PgUp/PgDown 键切换幻灯片")
.setName("显示进入禁用传送门的边缘")

regex.source: .setDesc("The type of node that will be created when double clicking on the canvas.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在画布上双击时将创建的节点类型。")

regex.source: .setDesc("When enabled, a node created by double clicking will be aligned to the grid.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用后，通过双击创建的节点将对齐到网格。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The default width of a text node.")
.setDesc("The default height of a text node.")
.setDesc("The default width of a file node.")
.setDesc("The default height of a file node.")
.setDesc("Add custom style settings for nodes. (Go to GitHub for more information)")
regex.target: .setDesc("为节点添加自定义样式设置。（更多信息请访问 GitHub）")

regex.source: .setDesc("Add custom style settings for edges. (Go to GitHub for more information)")
regex.target: .setDesc("为边缘添加自定义样式设置。（更多信息请访问 GitHub）")

regex.source: .setDesc('When enabled, the arrow will be rotated to the direction of the edge if the pathfinding method is set to "Direct".')
regex.target: .setDesc('启用时，如果寻路方法设置为“直接”，则箭头将旋转到边缘的方向。')

regex.source: .setDesc("The resolution of the grid when using the A* path style. The lower the value, the more precise the path will be. But it will also take longer to calculate.")
regex.target: .setDesc("使用 A* 路径样式时的网格分辨率。值越低，路径越精确。但计算时间也会更长。")

regex.source: .setDesc("When enabled, the A* path style will be updated live while dragging the edge.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用时，拖动边缘时 A* 路径样式将实时更新。")

regex.source: .setDesc("When enabled, the A* path style will be rounded.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用时，A* 路径样式将变为圆滑。")

regex.source: .setDesc("When enabled, the canvas will zoom to the cloned node.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用时，画布将缩放到克隆的节点。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The margin between the cloned node and the source node.")
regex.target: .setDesc("克隆节点与源节点之间的边距。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The step size for expanding the node.")
.setDesc("When enabled, a group that is collapsed show its border while dragging a node.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用时，拖动节点时，已折叠的组将显示其边框。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If turned off, you can still set the start node using the corresponding command.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果关闭，你仍然可以使用相应的命令设置起始节点。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The default ratio of the slide. For example, 16:9 is 1200x675 and 3:2 is 1350x900.")
regex.target: .setDesc("幻灯片的默认比例。例如，16:9 是 1200x675，3:2 是 1350x900。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The padding of the slide when wrapping the canvas in a slide.")
regex.target: .setDesc("将画布包裹在幻灯片中时的幻灯片内边距。")

regex.source: .setDesc("When enabled, you can use the arrow keys to change slides in presentation mode.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用时，你可以在演示模式下使用箭头键切换幻灯片。")

regex.source: .setDesc("When enabled, you can use the PgUp/PgDown keys to change slides in presentation mode (Makes the presentation mode compatible with most presentation remotes).")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用时，你可以在演示模式下使用 PgUp/PgDown 键切换幻灯片（使演示模式与大多数演示遥控器兼容）。")

regex.source: .setDesc("When enabled, the canvas will zoom to the slide without padding.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用时，画布将缩放到无内边距的幻灯片。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The duration of the slide transition animation in seconds. Set to 0 to disable the animation.")
regex.target: .setDesc("幻灯片过渡动画的持续时间（秒）。设置为 0 以禁用动画。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The intensity of the slide transition animation. The higher the value, the more the canvas will zoom out before zooming in on the next slide.")
regex.target: .setDesc("幻灯片过渡动画的强度。值越高，画布在放大到下一张幻灯片之前会更多地缩小。")

regex.source: .setDesc("When enabled, closing a portal will change the size of the portal to the original, closed size.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用时，关闭传送门将改变传送门的大小至原始的关闭大小。")

regex.source: .setDesc("When enabled, edges into disabled portals will be shown by an edge to the portal node.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用时，将通过传送门节点的边缘显示进入禁用传送门的边缘。")

regex.source: .setTooltip("Add classes to the canvas wrapper element. Separate multiple classes with spaces.")
regex.target: .setTooltip("为画布包装元素添加类。用空格分隔多个类。")
